CRITICAL: raws does not serialize --queue-url parameter in request body. Against a live queue, raws gets QueueDoesNotExist; with --attribute-names gets SerializationException ('Unexpected field type'). aws validates required params client-side.
CRITICAL: raws does not serialize --queue-name parameter in request body. Against a live queue, raws still gets QueueDoesNotExist. aws validates required params client-side.

raws sends request to API (gets QueueDoesNotExist server error, exit 254); aws validates required params client-side (ParamValidation error, exit 252). Likely same serialization bug as other queue-url commands.

CRITICAL: raws does not serialize --queue-url parameter in request body. Against a live queue, raws gets QueueDoesNotExist while aws succeeds. aws validates required params client-side when param missing.
